pi_items.source: File path verified against environment configuration (user 'ga' created in env.json with home directory /home/ga/), and consistent with setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts which use this path

Verified against task description ('play at least 4 complete moves') and verifier.py logic which expects 'at least 3-4 moves made' for significant progress. Web search confirmed that chess opening phase typically lasts 10-15 moves, so 4 white moves (approximately 8 total half-moves) would be in early opening/middle opening phase with pieces developed.

privileged_info_summary: The chess_activity task uses GCompris, real educational software containing 180+ activities with a chess game activity powered by gnuchess engine. The expected screenshot path /home/ga/chess_progress.png is valid (user 'ga' is configured in the environment). The minimum move requirement of 4 white moves is reasonable and consistent with the task description and verifier's acceptance criteria. No synthetic data is involved; the task uses the actual GCompris chess game.
